description_long: This is an ornate gold necklace featuring intricate floral motifs and layered decorative elements. The necklace consists of a fine gold chain supporting two prominent, vertically aligned clusters of detailed filigree work, each resembling a bouquet of flowers. The upper cluster is larger and more elaborate, while the lower cluster is slightly smaller but equally detailed, both connected by two parallel gold bars. The overall design is symmetrical and highly decorative, with a luxurious and traditional aesthetic. The necklace is displayed on a white bust, highlighting its craftsmanship and the delicate interplay of curves and textures. The gold surface appears polished, giving the piece a lustrous and elegant finish.
description: An elaborate gold necklace with intricate floral filigree clusters and a polished, luxurious finish. The design features layered decorative elements connected by gold bars for a traditional, ornate look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with its detailed floral clusters and gold chain draped symmetrically.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the necklace's profile and the way the chain contours around the display bust.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the gold chain encircling the neck, with no visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the chain's curve and the necklace's layered depth.
